howItWorks.intro: This haunted location risk calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Risk Score
rules.formula: Score = Age Factor + Deaths×10 + Reports×5 + Cemetery Bonus
rules.explanation: Weighted sum of historical and environmental factors.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: Allegedly: violent deaths, old buildings, proximity to burial sites, and repeated reports.

faq.q: Do old buildings have more activity?
faq.a: Older buildings have more reported sightings, though this may correlate with more history.
